ModDescription: Transmarvel, fixed - fully configurable in Configure Mod: tick which of the 41 chase sigils stay in the pool (equal odds, wrightstones always tier-3 Transmarveled); tick which 2nd traits can roll (default: a curated 11 - no junk resistances; only combos the vanilla game could naturally produce are ever generated); and guaranteed Transmarvel Vouchers per Chaos+ clear (default x10, 0-99, 0 = off). Restart the game after changing any setting - all tables are generated at launch. Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0. Curio pools and sub-Chaos rewards untouched.
